slides.headline: Boost Your Students' Thinking Speed with These Low-Prep Writing Activities!
slides.headline_short: Boost Your Students' Thinking Speed with
slides.headline_display: Boost Your Students' Thinking Speed with These Low-Prep Writing Activities!

image_asset.local_path: C:\Users\User\OneDrive - Board of Education of SD 39 (Vancouver)\Documents\Carousels\carousels-repo2\.tmp\image-assets\studio-20260401-030029-358a42-v1\slide-01-pexels-8617760.jpeg
image_asset.credit: Photo by Yan Krukau on Pexels

slides.headline: Quick Freewriting Prompts
slides.body: Give students a 3-minute prompt to write nonstop. This builds fluency and encourages quick idea generation without overthinking.
slides.body_short: Give students a 3-minute prompt to write nonstop.
slides.body_display: Give students a 3-minute prompt to write nonstop. This builds fluency and encourages quick idea generation without overthinking.

image_asset.local_path: C:\Users\User\OneDrive - Board of Education of SD 39 (Vancouver)\Documents\Carousels\carousels-repo2\.tmp\image-assets\studio-20260401-030029-358a42-v1\slide-02-pexels-6502817.jpeg

slides.headline: Sentence Starters Challenge
slides.body: Provide sentence starters related to the lesson. Students complete them quickly to practice forming ideas and improve writing flow.
slides.body_short: Provide sentence starters related to the lesson.
slides.body_display: Provide sentence starters related to the lesson. Students complete them quickly to practice forming ideas and improve writing flow.

slides.headline: Timed Word Association
slides.body: Call out keywords and have students write associated words or short phrases fast, helping them form connections and expand vocabulary.
slides.body_short: Call out keywords and have students write associated words or short phrases fast
slides.body_display: Call out keywords and have students write associated words or short phrases fast, helping them form connections and expand vocabulary.

image_asset.local_path: C:\Users\User\OneDrive - Board of Education of SD 39 (Vancouver)\Documents\Carousels\carousels-repo2\.tmp\image-assets\studio-20260401-030029-358a42-v1\slide-04-pexels-6502817.jpeg

slides.headline: Picture-Based Storytelling
slides.body: Show an interesting image and ask students to write a quick story. This activity sparks creativity and helps them organize thoughts rapidly.
slides.body_short: Show an interesting image and ask students to write a quick story.
slides.body_display: Show an interesting image and ask students to write a quick story. This activity sparks creativity and helps them organize thoughts rapidly.

slides.headline: Collaborative Quick Writes
slides.body: Students write short passages together in pairs or groups, prompting immediate responses and shared ideas to boost thinking speed.
slides.body_short: Students write short passages together in pairs or groups
slides.body_display: Students write short passages together in pairs or groups, prompting immediate responses and shared ideas to boost thinking speed.

slides.headline: Quick Freewriting Sessions
slides.body: Set a timer for 5 minutes. Students write nonstop to build quick thinking and fluency.
slides.body_short: Set a timer for 5 minutes. Students write nonstop to build quick thinking and fluency.
slides.body_display: Set a timer for 5 minutes. Students write nonstop to build quick thinking and fluency.

slides.headline: Picture Prompt Stories
slides.body: Show an image and ask students to write a short story. It sparks creativity and rapid idea generation.
slides.body_short: Show an image and ask students to write a short story.
slides.body_display: Show an image and ask students to write a short story. It sparks creativity and rapid idea generation.

slides.headline: Role-play Writing
slides.body: Give students character roles to write dialogues. This engages thinking on the spot and conversation skills.

slides.body_display: Give students character roles to write dialogues. This engages thinking on the spot and conversation skills.
